spec.title: Logs — conversation_id=${conversation_id}
spec.description: Loki filter on conversation_id. Every log line is also tagged trace_id and span_id — click 'Inspect → Trace' on a row to jump back into Tempo.

spec.title: Errors only
spec.description: Filtered to log lines that mention error/warning level for the same conversation.

spec.title: Tokens — input
spec.description: Sum of input tokens parsed from sigil-generation log lines for this conversation.

spec.title: Tokens — output
spec.description: Sum of output tokens parsed from sigil-generation log lines for this conversation.

spec.title: Conversation cost
spec.description: Sum of per-turn USD cost parsed from sigil-generation log lines for this conversation.

options.content:
**Conversation:** `${conversation_id}`

**What the AI sees** (auto-summarized from spans + logs in this conversation):

1. The chat assistant called the `search_products` tool.
2. Tool dispatched `GET search-service:3000/?q=mice` — returned **HTTP 500**.
3. search-service emitted span `db.postgres.query` with status **ERROR**: `failed to query products for category=mice` (Postgres code **42703 / undefined_column**).
4. The failing SQL referenced a column that doesn't exist in `products` — symptomatic of a **partially-rolled migration** or **stale schema**.

**Suggested next step:** check `search-service` for the column name vs the live `products` table schema. The Span breakdown panel below shows the failing SQL verbatim.

spec.title: 🔬 AI investigation feed — eval + diagnosis events for this conversation
spec.description: Live tail of evaluator and diagnosis log lines scoped to this conversation_id. The eval framework auto-classifies tool errors, hallucinations, and policy issues — visible here in real time.

spec.title: Traces in this conversation
spec.description: Each row = one trace tagged with this conversation.id. Click the Trace ID to open the full waterfall in Tempo Explore.

spec.title: Span breakdown (latency, status, error)
spec.description: Every span in this conversation. Sort by duration to find the long tail.

spec.query: { span.gen_ai.conversation.id="${conversation_id}" || span.session.id="${conversation_id}" } | select(span:name, span:duration, span:status, resource.service.name, span.error.message)

spec.title: Total spans in conversation
spec.description: All spans tagged with this conversation.id, summed across the dashboard time range.

spec.title: Error spans in conversation
spec.description: Spans with status=error for this conversation. Red if any errors exist.

spec.title: Failing tool calls
spec.description: Tool spans with status=error in this conversation.

spec.name: conversation_id
spec.label: conversation.id
spec.description: Paste the conversation.id here, or arrive via deep-link (?var-conversation_id=...).
